DP.089.0000:
I’ve had this TM Recycle for such
a long time now.\f
It’s not anything that I have much
use for these days.\f
I do hope you’ll put it to good
use, young Trainer.\f
DP.089.0001:
Folks like me have a long history
we can look back on.\f
Young people like you have only the
future to look forward to.
DP.089.0002:
Gardenia, our Gym Leader, goes out
to Eterna Forest every so often.\f
I always wonder what she does there.
